name: Search movies
description: Search for movies in the Radarr library and on TMDB. Returns availability status — hasFile indicates the movie is downloaded and ready to watch. Movies not yet added to Radarr will have id=null. Use the returned id (Radarr ID) with radarr_get_movie for more details, or use the tmdbId with seerr_request to request a movie.

name: Build request
Format response
Get movie
description: Get detailed information about a movie in the Radarr library by its Radarr ID. Returns file status, size on disk, quality and path. Use radarr_search first to find the Radarr ID.
